commit.subject: LU-16429 ahead: rename statahead into more generic ahead
commit.message:
LU-16429 ahead: rename statahead into more generic ahead

This patch renames the statahead codes into more generic ahead to
better support the coming [stat|open|create|read]-ahead features.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I4652751e018906a7ca7159c4c440c6609f8dcbf2
